evidence: user request in chat: start a new goal, not the stuck old lane
decision: Start a new orchestrator lane because the old Gate 0.a workflow optimized FileViewer visual repair instead of shared BridgeViewer navigation/store proof.

Spec review found real contract gaps; accepted fixes landed for shared navigation commands, typed Review file targets, required Files-to-Review handoff, provider-owned Review comparison authority, native proof specificity, and stale FileViewer-only wording. Next step is a vertical-slice plan rewrite before implementation resumes.
